package rulecoverage

func NegativeModelPackageDependsOnTransportOrGin() string {
    ruleID := "model_package_depends_on_transport_or_gin"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`model` or `models` packages that import transport-facing libraries or handler DTO packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
